title: No priority as between movables and immovables
doc_html:
Art. 3262.  No priority as between movables and immovables

There shall be no priority in the order of sale as between movable and immovable property.
doc_text:
Art. 3262.  No priority as between movables and immovables
There shall be no priority in the order of sale as between movable and immovable property.
